hero.headline: Implementation specialist who delivers enterprise software deployments
hero.description: Seasoned implementation specialist with extensive experience deploying enterprise SaaS solutions across diverse global markets. Proven track record of executing end-to-end software implementations, from initial system configuration and data migration through user training and production deployment. Skilled at managing complex technical rollouts while ensuring seamless integration with existing business processes and minimal operational disruption.

experience.title: Lead, Product Implementation
bullets: Managed 20 end-to-end enterprise software implementations for mid-to-large clients — coordinating project timelines, prioritizing tasks, and maintaining project plans from scoping through post-go-live support.
Conducted scheduled client workshops with executives and operational teams; documented requirements into BRDs and translated them into solution designs and project deliverables.
Configured and tested SaaS applications tailored to each client's requirements, ensuring systems functioned properly and driving user adoption.
Coordinated internally with product, engineering, and design teams while serving as primary client contact throughout implementation lifecycle.

highlights.label: Project methodology
highlights.text: Developed a use-case-driven implementation framework with complexity scoring and effort estimation models — enabling accurate project scoping, automated timeline calculation, and reduced ambiguity in requirements and testing phases.

highlights.label: Client success metrics
highlights.text: 4 of 5 pilots successfully converted to full enterprise deployments through structured discovery, early value demonstration, and stakeholder alignment during pilot phases — driving $350K+ in expansion revenue.

highlights.label: Global project delivery
highlights.text: Traveled on-site to Saudi Arabia and UK for high-value client engagements — conducting requirement gathering workshops, stakeholder training, and go-live support across multiple time zones and regions.

highlights.label: Requirements & configuration
highlights.text: Owned complete requirements lifecycle from client workshops to BRD documentation. Configured enterprise software systems including SSO (SAML/SCIM) and third-party integrations with platforms like Xero, CorrigoPro, and Bill.com.

experience.title: Senior Catalog Specialist
bullets: Managed operational processes and resolved system defects for Amazon Fresh, Amazon Pantry, and Prime Now — ensuring data accuracy and system functionality.
Created a defect prioritisation framework using forecasting data and inventory metrics — delivering an estimated $230K in monthly operational savings.
Identified process gaps and streamlined workflows, reducing invalid case assignments between support teams by approximately 50 cases per day.

customSections.title: Financial & Enterprise Software Experience
items: Enterprise SaaS configuration and deployment across multiple industries
Third-party financial platform integrations: Xero, Bill.com, and payment systems
Data accuracy frameworks and inventory value optimization ($230K monthly savings)
Cross-functional coordination with product, engineering, and business stakeholders
